overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (God of War) showing the character Kratos walking along ancient stone ruins by a body of water, ascending weathered stairs, and exploring a rocky coastal landscape under bright sunlight with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal stone walkway beside calm water

events.description: companion character standing by the water dissolves into blue particles and disappears
approaching the base of the stone stairway, preparing to ascend

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking steadily along the waterfront path with his axe strapped to his back, moving toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: standing by the water then dissolving into blue particles and vanishing completely

entered.detail: tall weathered stone cliff with patches of vegetation rising beside the path
tranquil body of water reflecting the blue sky, bordered by distant rock formations
ancient cobblestone path running alongside the water's edge
large mushroom-shaped rock formation with a red marking visible in the distance
tall wooden pole with a tattered blue flag fluttering in the breeze

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks along a sunlit coastal path beside calm waters, with a rocky cliff on his left and distant rock formations ahead. A companion stands near a blue flag pole on the right before dissolving into particles, leaving Kratos alone as he approaches a stone stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone stairway carved into cliffside

events.description: beginning to ascend the weathered stone stairs, transitioning from flat walking to climbing
passing under a rock overhang, entering brief shadow while continuing ascent

agents.ego_description: Kratos climbing the steep ancient stone stairs, his shadow cast on the steps before him

entered.detail: weathered stone steps carved directly into the cliff face, leading upward
large curved rock formation creating a natural archway overhead at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Kratos ascends a narrow stone stairway carved into the cliff, the water now hidden behind the rock wall to his right. He passes under a rocky overhang that casts shadows across the path, continuing his climb toward the upper plateau.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper cliff plateau with ancient ruins and scattered vegetation

events.description: emerging from the stairway onto the open upper plateau, revealing ruins and a large tree
reaching the top of the stairs and turning left to explore the ruin area

agents.ego_description: Kratos surveys the upper ruin area, turning left and walking past ancient stone structures

entered.detail: crumbling ancient stone walls and foundations covered in patches of grass
tall broken stone column standing upright among the ruins
mature tree with spreading canopy growing from the rocky plateau
hazy blue mountains visible on the horizon beyond the plateau

segments.scene_description: Kratos emerges onto a sunlit plateau dotted with ancient stone ruins and a large central tree. He turns left to explore the area, passing crumbling walls and broken pillars while distant mountains become visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright coastal path up a narrow cliffside ascent and onto an expansive plateau of ancient ruins. It begins with Kratos walking beside calm waters and a rocky cliff, passing a companion who dissolves into particles just as he reaches a stone stairway. As he begins to climb, the open water vanishes behind a rock wall and the bright light gives way to deep shadows beneath a rocky overhang. The scene then opens up as Kratos emerges from the climb onto a sunlit plateau centered around a large tree. Finally, the camera follows him as he turns left to explore crumbling walls and broken pillars, revealing distant mountains on the horizon.
